summary: Tested multiple memorization entries feature for SessionNotesDialog. Backend API accepts 'memorization_entries' list field with proper validation. Frontend component has all required data-testid attributes and correct implementation. All 9 backend tests passed. Frontend code review verified correct implementation.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: SessionNotes model (line 228-233) has both 'memorization_progress' (single) and 'memorization_entries' (list) fields
VERIFIED: add_session_notes endpoint (lines 2676-2681) builds all_entries list from memorization_entries first, then falls back to single memorization_progress
VERIFIED: Each entry is validated independently for surah_name and ayah range (lines 2686-2693)
VERIFIED: All entries saved to memorization_progress collection with same session_id (lines 2695-2711)
VERIFIED: SessionNotesDialog.jsx has EMPTY_ENTRY factory function for creating new entries

VERIFIED: MemorizationBlock component has all required data-testid attributes (mem-block-{index}, surah-select-{index}, from-ayah-{index}, to-ayah-{index}, quality-select-{index}, mem-notes-{index}, remove-mem-block-{index})
VERIFIED: 'Add another section' button has data-testid='add-mem-entry-btn'
VERIFIED: Remove button only appears when memEntries.length > 1 (canRemove prop)
VERIFIED: handleSave filters valid entries (all 4 required fields) before sending to backend
VERIFIED: Client-side validation for ayah range before API call
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multiple memorization entries feature fully implemented and tested. Backend accepts 'memorization_entries' list field with backward compatibility for single 'memorization_progress' field. Frontend SessionNotesDialog has dynamic list of MemorizationBlock components with add/remove functionality. Teacher authentication (Google OAuth) required to fully test the dialog in browser - code review confirms correct implementation.

verified_features.backend_memorization_entries_list: PASSED - SessionNotes model accepts memorization_entries list
verified_features.backend_backward_compat: PASSED - Single memorization_progress field still works
verified_features.backend_save_all_entries: PASSED - All entries saved with same session_id
verified_features.frontend_block_fields: PASSED - Each block has surah, from/to ayah, quality, notes
